Package trienodes

Class ACTrieNodeFactory

java.lang.Object
trienodes.ACTrieNodeFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
AbstractACNodeFactory<ACTrieNode>
public class ACTrieNodeFactory
extends java.lang.Object
implements AbstractACNodeFactory<ACTrieNode>
The default ACTrieNodeFactory which generates standard ACTrieNodes.
Since:
26.12.2020, Sa.
Author:
Markus Walder

    ACTrieNode createFromDefaultValues​(LanguageParameter parameters, boolean isEndOfWord, java.lang.Character parentChar)
    A simple factory method that takes a set of default parameters and then returns an ACTrieNode to the caller.

  • Constructor Details

    • ACTrieNodeFactory

      public ACTrieNodeFactory()

  • Method Details

    • createFromDefaultValues

      public ACTrieNode createFromDefaultValues​(LanguageParameter parameters, boolean isEndOfWord, java.lang.Character parentChar)
      A simple factory method that takes a set of default parameters and then returns an ACTrieNode to the caller. This is the most basic (default) factory.
      Specified by:
      createFromDefaultValues in interface AbstractACNodeFactory<ACTrieNode>
      Parameters:
      parameters - The LanguageParameter that define our underlying Alphabet
      isEndOfWord - Boolean - Indicates whether this Suffix Trie Node represents the end of a word
      parentChar - Character - tells us which character leads to this node from the parent.
      Returns:
      Returns a new basic ACTrieNode
